agent_prompts.workflow: Use the realized update for SRC_ROOT_CARRY_LONG_220646 to review whether the latest result should change factor weights, factor evidence interpretation, or future trade acceptance thresholds.

prompts.objective: Audit whether the dataset and command context are sufficient for trustworthy iteration.
prompts.system_prompt: You are the dataset-audit agent. Check whether the current dataset scope, paired market coverage, and command context are sufficient before making factor or model changes.
prompts.user_prompt: Symbol=SRC_ROOT_CARRY_LONG_220646 data_path=update-command paired_data_path=None candles=1 paired_candles=None source_command=update
success_criteria: Flag low sample size or missing paired-market evidence before approving major factor changes
If this run is not comparable to prior runs, tell the next agent not to over-interpret score deltas

prompts.objective: Review the newly realized outcome and decide what the next agent iteration should target.
prompts.system_prompt: You are the realized-feedback agent. Use the updated trade_outcome distribution plus factor scorecards to decide whether the latest result strengthens confidence, exposes a factor weakness, or suggests a problem in evidence mapping.
prompts.user_prompt: Symbol=SRC_ROOT_CARRY_LONG_220646 entry_quality=medium factor_alignment=bullish factor_uncertainty=low realized_outcome=loss structural_learning_semantics=class=negative_executed success_credit=0.000 observation_weight=1.000 feedback_records_applied=1 updated_trade_outcome={"breakeven": 0.2483343, "loss": 0.3665008, "win": 0.38516490000000003} iteration_queue=[]
success_criteria: If duplicate_feedback_skipped is true, do not infer a new learning event
If factor_alignment and realized_outcome disagree repeatedly, prioritize evidence-mapping review or factor replacement
If updated_trade_outcome improves while factor scores stay weak, review BBN calibration before editing factor code

prompts.objective: Select which factors to keep, tune, observe, or replace.
prompts.system_prompt: You are the factor-iteration agent. Use only the supplied scorecards and feedback summary to decide which factor edits are justified. Do not invent success criteria; follow the thresholds embedded in each factor prompt.
prompts.user_prompt: Symbol=SRC_ROOT_CARRY_LONG_220646 top_scorecards=[] iteration_queue=[] feedback_summary=records:1 wins:0 losses:1 avg_pnl:-0.040600 factor_success_rates:{}
success_criteria: Prioritize replace > tune > observe > keep
Only recommend replacing a factor when its action is replace or replacement_candidate=true
Use the factor-specific agent prompt as the acceptance rule for the next iteration

prompts.objective: Review which factors are failing by regime and whether weight updates should be trusted.
prompts.system_prompt: You are the feedback-diagnostics agent. Compare factor success rates, grading, and weaknesses. Focus on regime-conditional failure and persistent underperformance.
prompts.user_prompt: Symbol=SRC_ROOT_CARRY_LONG_220646 feedback_total=1 avg_pnl=-0.040600 weak_factors=[]
success_criteria: Flag factors with narrow regime coverage or unstable walk-forward
Do not promote a weaker factor just because it has higher recent win rate on small sample

prompts.objective: Review whether the realized update materially changed model state.
prompts.system_prompt: You are the update-diff agent. Use the trade_outcome probability deltas and factor score deltas to judge whether this realized result should change factor code, evidence mapping, or neither.
prompts.user_prompt: Symbol=SRC_ROOT_CARRY_LONG_220646 duplicate_feedback_skipped=false trade_outcome_deltas=[ProbabilityDiff { state: "breakeven", previous: Some(0.275927), new: 0.2483343, delta: -0.02759269999999997 }, ProbabilityDiff { state: "loss", previous: Some(0.296112), new: 0.3665008, delta: 0.07038880000000003 }, ProbabilityDiff { state: "win", previous: Some(0.427961), new: 0.38516490000000003, delta: -0.04279609999999995 }] factor_score_deltas=[]
success_criteria: If duplicate_feedback_skipped is true, recommend no model change
If outcome probabilities changed materially but factor scores did not, investigate BBN evidence mapping

prompts.objective: Review artifact-driven actions and ensure they align with the next code or model iteration.
prompts.system_prompt: You are the artifact-decision agent. Use the artifact decision section to validate whether the current pending/execution artifacts strengthen promotion, trigger rollback review, or should only be observed.
prompts.user_prompt: Symbol=SRC_ROOT_CARRY_LONG_220646 artifact_summary=actionable_artifacts=0 latest_promotable=None rule_breaks=0 consumed_trend=no_consumed_validation consumed_targets=[] consumed_trend_status=no_consumed_validation consumed_trend_reason=no_consumed_artifacts highlighted_actions=["learning_semantics=class=negative_executed success_credit=0.000 observation_weight=1.000"] top_factor_trends=[] top_family_trends=[] top_rule_break_effects=[] top_consumed_trends=[]
success_criteria: Explicitly state whether artifact evidence strengthens promotion, rollback review, or observation only
Do not ignore rule-break effects when artifact review versions changed
Use consumed validation trends when realized artifact outcomes are available
Name the artifact-driven factor/family targets before recommending code edits

prompts.objective: Decide whether a factor iteration is strong enough to promote.
prompts.system_prompt: You are the promotion-gate agent. Only approve factor promotion when score deltas, grading, and supporting metrics clear the configured improvement thresholds. Reject cosmetic ranking changes.
prompts.user_prompt: Symbol=SRC_ROOT_CARRY_LONG_220646 thresholds={promotion_min_score_delta:0.100, promotion_min_score:0.700} top_rankings=[] score_deltas=[] learning_semantics=class=negative_executed success_credit=0.000 observation_weight=1.000
success_criteria: Only promote replace/tune outcomes when score delta is material and stability is not worse
If trade_count is low or dataset coverage changed, recommend holdout validation before promotion
Use learning_semantics to distinguish full-credit, fractional-credit, and no-credit feedback before approving promotion or rollback.

prompts.objective: Decide whether recent changes should be rolled back or isolated.
prompts.system_prompt: You are the rollback-review agent. Look for score degradation, action downgrades, and harmful probability shifts. Recommend rollback when the latest iteration weakened factor quality or destabilized outcome calibration.
prompts.user_prompt: Symbol=SRC_ROOT_CARRY_LONG_220646 thresholds={rollback_score_delta:-0.100, rollback_probability_delta:0.100} score_deltas=[] trade_outcome_deltas=[ProbabilityDiff { state: "breakeven", previous: Some(0.275927), new: 0.2483343, delta: -0.02759269999999997 }, ProbabilityDiff { state: "loss", previous: Some(0.296112), new: 0.3665008, delta: 0.07038880000000003 }, ProbabilityDiff { state: "win", previous: Some(0.427961), new: 0.38516490000000003, delta: -0.04279609999999995 }] learning_semantics=class=negative_executed success_credit=0.000 observation_weight=1.000
success_criteria: Recommend rollback when strong factors degrade materially or outcome calibration shifts against realized performance
If only one factor family regressed, prefer targeted rollback over full revert
Use learning_semantics to distinguish full-credit, fractional-credit, and no-credit feedback before approving promotion or rollback.

prompts.user_prompt: Symbol=SRC_ROOT_CARRY_LONG_220646 duplicate_feedback_skipped=false trade_outcome_deltas=[ProbabilityDiff { state: "breakeven", previous: Some(0.201150783), new: 0.1810357047, delta: -0.020115078300000006 }, ProbabilityDiff { state: "loss", previous: Some(0.396865648), new: 0.3571790832, delta: -0.03968656479999999 }, ProbabilityDiff { state: "win", previous: Some(0.401983569), new: 0.4617852121, delta: 0.059801643100000024 }] factor_score_deltas=[]
success_criteria: If duplicate_feedback_skipped is true, recommend no model change
If outcome probabilities changed materially but factor scores did not, investigate BBN evidence mapping

prompts.objective: Review artifact-driven actions and ensure they align with the next code or model iteration.
prompts.system_prompt: You are the artifact-decision agent. Use the artifact decision section to validate whether the current pending/execution artifacts strengthen promotion, trigger rollback review, or should only be observed.
prompts.user_prompt: Symbol=SRC_ROOT_CARRY_LONG_220646 artifact_summary=actionable_artifacts=0 latest_promotable=None rule_breaks=0 consumed_trend=no_consumed_validation consumed_targets=[] consumed_trend_status=no_consumed_validation consumed_trend_reason=no_consumed_artifacts highlighted_actions=["learning_semantics=class=positive_executed success_credit=1.000 observation_weight=1.000"] top_factor_trends=[] top_family_trends=[] top_rule_break_effects=[] top_consumed_trends=[]
success_criteria: Explicitly state whether artifact evidence strengthens promotion, rollback review, or observation only
Do not ignore rule-break effects when artifact review versions changed
Use consumed validation trends when realized artifact outcomes are available
Name the artifact-driven factor/family targets before recommending code edits

prompts.objective: Decide whether a factor iteration is strong enough to promote.
prompts.system_prompt: You are the promotion-gate agent. Only approve factor promotion when score deltas, grading, and supporting metrics clear the configured improvement thresholds. Reject cosmetic ranking changes.
prompts.user_prompt: Symbol=SRC_ROOT_CARRY_LONG_220646 thresholds={promotion_min_score_delta:0.100, promotion_min_score:0.700} top_rankings=[] score_deltas=[] learning_semantics=class=positive_executed success_credit=1.000 observation_weight=1.000
success_criteria: Only promote replace/tune outcomes when score delta is material and stability is not worse
If trade_count is low or dataset coverage changed, recommend holdout validation before promotion
Use learning_semantics to distinguish full-credit, fractional-credit, and no-credit feedback before approving promotion or rollback.

prompts.objective: Decide whether recent changes should be rolled back or isolated.
prompts.system_prompt: You are the rollback-review agent. Look for score degradation, action downgrades, and harmful probability shifts. Recommend rollback when the latest iteration weakened factor quality or destabilized outcome calibration.
prompts.user_prompt: Symbol=SRC_ROOT_CARRY_LONG_220646 thresholds={rollback_score_delta:-0.100, rollback_probability_delta:0.100} score_deltas=[] trade_outcome_deltas=[ProbabilityDiff { state: "breakeven", previous: Some(0.201150783), new: 0.1810357047, delta: -0.020115078300000006 }, ProbabilityDiff { state: "loss", previous: Some(0.396865648), new: 0.3571790832, delta: -0.03968656479999999 }, ProbabilityDiff { state: "win", previous: Some(0.401983569), new: 0.4617852121, delta: 0.059801643100000024 }] learning_semantics=class=positive_executed success_credit=1.000 observation_weight=1.000
success_criteria: Recommend rollback when strong factors degrade materially or outcome calibration shifts against realized performance
If only one factor family regressed, prefer targeted rollback over full revert
Use learning_semantics to distinguish full-credit, fractional-credit, and no-credit feedback before approving promotion or rollback.

prompts.user_prompt: Symbol=SRC_ROOT_CARRY_LONG_220646 artifact_summary=actionable_artifacts=0 latest_promotable=None rule_breaks=0 consumed_trend=no_consumed_validation consumed_targets=[] consumed_trend_status=no_consumed_validation consumed_trend_reason=no_consumed_artifacts highlighted_actions=["learning_semantics=class=negative_executed success_credit=0.000 observation_weight=1.000"] top_factor_trends=[] top_family_trends=[] top_rule_break_effects=[] top_consumed_trends=[]
success_criteria: Explicitly state whether artifact evidence strengthens promotion, rollback review, or observation only
Do not ignore rule-break effects when artifact review versions changed
Use consumed validation trends when realized artifact outcomes are available
Name the artifact-driven factor/family targets before recommending code edits

prompts.objective: Decide whether a factor iteration is strong enough to promote.
prompts.system_prompt: You are the promotion-gate agent. Only approve factor promotion when score deltas, grading, and supporting metrics clear the configured improvement thresholds. Reject cosmetic ranking changes.
prompts.user_prompt: Symbol=SRC_ROOT_CARRY_LONG_220646 thresholds={promotion_min_score_delta:0.100, promotion_min_score:0.700} top_rankings=[] score_deltas=[] learning_semantics=class=negative_executed success_credit=0.000 observation_weight=1.000
success_criteria: Only promote replace/tune outcomes when score delta is material and stability is not worse
If trade_count is low or dataset coverage changed, recommend holdout validation before promotion
Use learning_semantics to distinguish full-credit, fractional-credit, and no-credit feedback before approving promotion or rollback.

prompts.objective: Decide whether recent changes should be rolled back or isolated.
prompts.system_prompt: You are the rollback-review agent. Look for score degradation, action downgrades, and harmful probability shifts. Recommend rollback when the latest iteration weakened factor quality or destabilized outcome calibration.
prompts.user_prompt: Symbol=SRC_ROOT_CARRY_LONG_220646 thresholds={rollback_score_delta:-0.100, rollback_probability_delta:0.100} score_deltas=[] trade_outcome_deltas=[ProbabilityDiff { state: "breakeven", previous: Some(0.275927), new: 0.2483343, delta: -0.02759269999999997 }, ProbabilityDiff { state: "loss", previous: Some(0.296112), new: 0.3665008, delta: 0.07038880000000003 }, ProbabilityDiff { state: "win", previous: Some(0.427961), new: 0.38516490000000003, delta: -0.04279609999999995 }] learning_semantics=class=negative_executed success_credit=0.000 observation_weight=1.000
success_criteria: Recommend rollback when strong factors degrade materially or outcome calibration shifts against realized performance
If only one factor family regressed, prefer targeted rollback over full revert
Use learning_semantics to distinguish full-credit, fractional-credit, and no-credit feedback before approving promotion or rollback.

update.rationale: apply the persisted pending feedback artifact at /Users/thrill3r/projects-ict-engine/ict-engine/docs/experiments/actionable-regime-confidence/runs/20260512T002020-codex-board-b-220646-branch-path-closure-readback-v1/b5-branch-feedback-calibration-v2/feedback/feedback_025_bear.json

agent_prompts.workflow: Use the realized update for SRC_ROOT_CARRY_LONG_220646 to review whether the latest result should change factor weights, factor evidence interpretation, or future trade acceptance thresholds.

prompts.objective: Audit whether the dataset and command context are sufficient for trustworthy iteration.
prompts.system_prompt: You are the dataset-audit agent. Check whether the current dataset scope, paired market coverage, and command context are sufficient before making factor or model changes.
prompts.user_prompt: Symbol=SRC_ROOT_CARRY_LONG_220646 data_path=update-command paired_data_path=None candles=1 paired_candles=None source_command=update
success_criteria: Flag low sample size or missing paired-market evidence before approving major factor changes
If this run is not comparable to prior runs, tell the next agent not to over-interpret score deltas

prompts.objective: Review the newly realized outcome and decide what the next agent iteration should target.
prompts.system_prompt: You are the realized-feedback agent. Use the updated trade_outcome distribution plus factor scorecards to decide whether the latest result strengthens confidence, exposes a factor weakness, or suggests a problem in evidence mapping.
prompts.user_prompt: Symbol=SRC_ROOT_CARRY_LONG_220646 entry_quality=medium factor_alignment=bullish factor_uncertainty=high realized_outcome=loss structural_learning_semantics=class=negative_executed success_credit=0.000 observation_weight=1.000 feedback_records_applied=1 updated_trade_outcome={"breakeven": 0.16293213423, "loss": 0.34046117488000005, "win": 0.49660669089} iteration_queue=[]
success_criteria: If duplicate_feedback_skipped is true, do not infer a new learning event
If factor_alignment and realized_outcome disagree repeatedly, prioritize evidence-mapping review or factor replacement
If updated_trade_outcome improves while factor scores stay weak, review BBN calibration before editing factor code

prompts.objective: Select which factors to keep, tune, observe, or replace.
prompts.system_prompt: You are the factor-iteration agent. Use only the supplied scorecards and feedback summary to decide which factor edits are justified. Do not invent success criteria; follow the thresholds embedded in each factor prompt.
prompts.user_prompt: Symbol=SRC_ROOT_CARRY_LONG_220646 top_scorecards=[] iteration_queue=[] feedback_summary=records:25 wins:12 losses:13 avg_pnl:-0.003202 factor_success_rates:{}
success_criteria: Prioritize replace > tune > observe > keep
Only recommend replacing a factor when its action is replace or replacement_candidate=true
Use the factor-specific agent prompt as the acceptance rule for the next iteration

prompts.objective: Review which factors are failing by regime and whether weight updates should be trusted.
prompts.system_prompt: You are the feedback-diagnostics agent. Compare factor success rates, grading, and weaknesses. Focus on regime-conditional failure and persistent underperformance.
prompts.user_prompt: Symbol=SRC_ROOT_CARRY_LONG_220646 feedback_total=25 avg_pnl=-0.003202 weak_factors=[]
success_criteria: Flag factors with narrow regime coverage or unstable walk-forward
Do not promote a weaker factor just because it has higher recent win rate on small sample

prompts.objective: Review whether the realized update materially changed model state.
prompts.system_prompt: You are the update-diff agent. Use the trade_outcome probability deltas and factor score deltas to judge whether this realized result should change factor code, evidence mapping, or neither.
prompts.user_prompt: Symbol=SRC_ROOT_CARRY_LONG_220646 duplicate_feedback_skipped=false trade_outcome_deltas=[ProbabilityDiff { state: "breakeven", previous: Some(0.1810357047), new: 0.16293213423, delta: -0.018103570469999997 }, ProbabilityDiff { state: "loss", previous: Some(0.26717908320000006), new: 0.34046117488000005, delta: 0.07328209168 }, ProbabilityDiff { state: "win", previous: Some(0.5517852121), new: 0.49660669089, delta: -0.05517852121 }] factor_score_deltas=[]
success_criteria: If duplicate_feedback_skipped is true, recommend no model change
If outcome probabilities changed materially but factor scores did not, investigate BBN evidence mapping

prompts.objective: Review artifact-driven actions and ensure they align with the next code or model iteration.
prompts.system_prompt: You are the artifact-decision agent. Use the artifact decision section to validate whether the current pending/execution artifacts strengthen promotion, trigger rollback review, or should only be observed.
prompts.user_prompt: Symbol=SRC_ROOT_CARRY_LONG_220646 artifact_summary=actionable_artifacts=0 latest_promotable=None rule_breaks=0 consumed_trend=no_consumed_validation consumed_targets=[] consumed_trend_status=no_consumed_validation consumed_trend_reason=no_consumed_artifacts highlighted_actions=["learning_semantics=class=negative_executed success_credit=0.000 observation_weight=1.000"] top_factor_trends=[] top_family_trends=[] top_rule_break_effects=[] top_consumed_trends=[]
success_criteria: Explicitly state whether artifact evidence strengthens promotion, rollback review, or observation only
Do not ignore rule-break effects when artifact review versions changed
Use consumed validation trends when realized artifact outcomes are available
Name the artifact-driven factor/family targets before recommending code edits

prompts.objective: Decide whether a factor iteration is strong enough to promote.
prompts.system_prompt: You are the promotion-gate agent. Only approve factor promotion when score deltas, grading, and supporting metrics clear the configured improvement thresholds. Reject cosmetic ranking changes.
prompts.user_prompt: Symbol=SRC_ROOT_CARRY_LONG_220646 thresholds={promotion_min_score_delta:0.100, promotion_min_score:0.700} top_rankings=[] score_deltas=[] learning_semantics=class=negative_executed success_credit=0.000 observation_weight=1.000
success_criteria: Only promote replace/tune outcomes when score delta is material and stability is not worse
If trade_count is low or dataset coverage changed, recommend holdout validation before promotion
Use learning_semantics to distinguish full-credit, fractional-credit, and no-credit feedback before approving promotion or rollback.

prompts.objective: Decide whether recent changes should be rolled back or isolated.
prompts.system_prompt: You are the rollback-review agent. Look for score degradation, action downgrades, and harmful probability shifts. Recommend rollback when the latest iteration weakened factor quality or destabilized outcome calibration.
prompts.user_prompt: Symbol=SRC_ROOT_CARRY_LONG_220646 thresholds={rollback_score_delta:-0.100, rollback_probability_delta:0.100} score_deltas=[] trade_outcome_deltas=[ProbabilityDiff { state: "breakeven", previous: Some(0.1810357047), new: 0.16293213423, delta: -0.018103570469999997 }, ProbabilityDiff { state: "loss", previous: Some(0.26717908320000006), new: 0.34046117488000005, delta: 0.07328209168 }, ProbabilityDiff { state: "win", previous: Some(0.5517852121), new: 0.49660669089, delta: -0.05517852121 }] learning_semantics=class=negative_executed success_credit=0.000 observation_weight=1.000
success_criteria: Recommend rollback when strong factors degrade materially or outcome calibration shifts against realized performance
If only one factor family regressed, prefer targeted rollback over full revert
Use learning_semantics to distinguish full-credit, fractional-credit, and no-credit feedback before approving promotion or rollback.

prompts.user_prompt: Symbol=SRC_ROOT_CARRY_LONG_220646 duplicate_feedback_skipped=false trade_outcome_deltas=[ProbabilityDiff { state: "breakeven", previous: Some(0.1319750287263), new: 0.11877752585366999, delta: -0.013197502872629996 }, ProbabilityDiff { state: "loss", previous: Some(0.3757735516528), new: 0.33819619648752003, delta: -0.03757735516527999 }, ProbabilityDiff { state: "win", previous: Some(0.4922514196209001), new: 0.5430262776588101, delta: 0.05077485803790999 }] factor_score_deltas=[]
success_criteria: If duplicate_feedback_skipped is true, recommend no model change
If outcome probabilities changed materially but factor scores did not, investigate BBN evidence mapping

prompts.objective: Review artifact-driven actions and ensure they align with the next code or model iteration.
prompts.system_prompt: You are the artifact-decision agent. Use the artifact decision section to validate whether the current pending/execution artifacts strengthen promotion, trigger rollback review, or should only be observed.
prompts.user_prompt: Symbol=SRC_ROOT_CARRY_LONG_220646 artifact_summary=actionable_artifacts=0 latest_promotable=None rule_breaks=0 consumed_trend=no_consumed_validation consumed_targets=[] consumed_trend_status=no_consumed_validation consumed_trend_reason=no_consumed_artifacts highlighted_actions=["learning_semantics=class=positive_executed success_credit=1.000 observation_weight=1.000"] top_factor_trends=[] top_family_trends=[] top_rule_break_effects=[] top_consumed_trends=[]
success_criteria: Explicitly state whether artifact evidence strengthens promotion, rollback review, or observation only
Do not ignore rule-break effects when artifact review versions changed
Use consumed validation trends when realized artifact outcomes are available
Name the artifact-driven factor/family targets before recommending code edits

prompts.objective: Decide whether a factor iteration is strong enough to promote.
prompts.system_prompt: You are the promotion-gate agent. Only approve factor promotion when score deltas, grading, and supporting metrics clear the configured improvement thresholds. Reject cosmetic ranking changes.
prompts.user_prompt: Symbol=SRC_ROOT_CARRY_LONG_220646 thresholds={promotion_min_score_delta:0.100, promotion_min_score:0.700} top_rankings=[] score_deltas=[] learning_semantics=class=positive_executed success_credit=1.000 observation_weight=1.000
success_criteria: Only promote replace/tune outcomes when score delta is material and stability is not worse
If trade_count is low or dataset coverage changed, recommend holdout validation before promotion
Use learning_semantics to distinguish full-credit, fractional-credit, and no-credit feedback before approving promotion or rollback.

prompts.objective: Decide whether recent changes should be rolled back or isolated.
prompts.system_prompt: You are the rollback-review agent. Look for score degradation, action downgrades, and harmful probability shifts. Recommend rollback when the latest iteration weakened factor quality or destabilized outcome calibration.
prompts.user_prompt: Symbol=SRC_ROOT_CARRY_LONG_220646 thresholds={rollback_score_delta:-0.100, rollback_probability_delta:0.100} score_deltas=[] trade_outcome_deltas=[ProbabilityDiff { state: "breakeven", previous: Some(0.1319750287263), new: 0.11877752585366999, delta: -0.013197502872629996 }, ProbabilityDiff { state: "loss", previous: Some(0.3757735516528), new: 0.33819619648752003, delta: -0.03757735516527999 }, ProbabilityDiff { state: "win", previous: Some(0.4922514196209001), new: 0.5430262776588101, delta: 0.05077485803790999 }] learning_semantics=class=positive_executed success_credit=1.000 observation_weight=1.000
success_criteria: Recommend rollback when strong factors degrade materially or outcome calibration shifts against realized performance
If only one factor family regressed, prefer targeted rollback over full revert
Use learning_semantics to distinguish full-credit, fractional-credit, and no-credit feedback before approving promotion or rollback.

success_criteria: Recommend rollback when strong factors degrade materially or outcome calibration shifts against realized performance
If only one factor family regressed, prefer targeted rollback over full revert
Use learning_semantics to distinguish full-credit, fractional-credit, and no-credit feedback before approving promotion or rollback.

prompts.objective: Audit whether the dataset and command context are sufficient for trustworthy iteration.
prompts.system_prompt: You are the dataset-audit agent. Check whether the current dataset scope, paired market coverage, and command context are sufficient before making factor or model changes.
prompts.user_prompt: Symbol=SRC_ROOT_CARRY_LONG_220646 data_path=update-command paired_data_path=None candles=1 paired_candles=None source_command=update

If this run is not comparable to prior runs, tell the next agent not to over-interpret score deltas

prompts.objective: Review the newly realized outcome and decide what the next agent iteration should target.
prompts.system_prompt: You are the realized-feedback agent. Use the updated trade_outcome distribution plus factor scorecards to decide whether the latest result strengthens confidence, exposes a factor weakness, or suggests a problem in evidence mapping.
prompts.user_prompt: Symbol=SRC_ROOT_CARRY_LONG_220646 entry_quality=medium factor_alignment=bullish factor_uncertainty=high realized_outcome=win structural_learning_semantics=class=positive_executed success_credit=1.000 observation_weight=1.000 feedback_records_applied=1 updated_trade_outcome={"breakeven": 0.07792993471259288, "loss": 0.3928905245154619, "win": 0.5291795407719453} iteration_queue=[]
success_criteria: If duplicate_feedback_skipped is true, do not infer a new learning event
If factor_alignment and realized_outcome disagree repeatedly, prioritize evidence-mapping review or factor replacement
If updated_trade_outcome improves while factor scores stay weak, review BBN calibration before editing factor code

prompts.objective: Select which factors to keep, tune, observe, or replace.
prompts.system_prompt: You are the factor-iteration agent. Use only the supplied scorecards and feedback summary to decide which factor edits are justified. Do not invent success criteria; follow the thresholds embedded in each factor prompt.
prompts.user_prompt: Symbol=SRC_ROOT_CARRY_LONG_220646 top_scorecards=[] iteration_queue=[] feedback_summary=records:32 wins:16 losses:16 avg_pnl:0.002494 factor_success_rates:{}
success_criteria: Prioritize replace > tune > observe > keep
Only recommend replacing a factor when its action is replace or replacement_candidate=true
Use the factor-specific agent prompt as the acceptance rule for the next iteration

prompts.objective: Review which factors are failing by regime and whether weight updates should be trusted.
prompts.system_prompt: You are the feedback-diagnostics agent. Compare factor success rates, grading, and weaknesses. Focus on regime-conditional failure and persistent underperformance.
prompts.user_prompt: Symbol=SRC_ROOT_CARRY_LONG_220646 feedback_total=32 avg_pnl=0.002494 weak_factors=[]
success_criteria: Flag factors with narrow regime coverage or unstable walk-forward
Do not promote a weaker factor just because it has higher recent win rate on small sample

prompts.objective: Review whether the realized update materially changed model state.
prompts.system_prompt: You are the update-diff agent. Use the trade_outcome probability deltas and factor score deltas to judge whether this realized result should change factor code, evidence mapping, or neither.
prompts.user_prompt: Symbol=SRC_ROOT_CARRY_LONG_220646 duplicate_feedback_skipped=false trade_outcome_deltas=[ProbabilityDiff { state: "breakeven", previous: Some(0.08658881634732542), new: 0.07792993471259288, delta: -0.008658881634732538 }, ProbabilityDiff { state: "loss", previous: Some(0.43654502723940214), new: 0.3928905245154619, delta: -0.043654502723940225 }, ProbabilityDiff { state: "win", previous: Some(0.4768661564132725), new: 0.5291795407719453, delta: 0.052313384358672776 }] factor_score_deltas=[]
success_criteria: If duplicate_feedback_skipped is true, recommend no model change
If outcome probabilities changed materially but factor scores did not, investigate BBN evidence mapping

prompts.objective: Review artifact-driven actions and ensure they align with the next code or model iteration.
prompts.system_prompt: You are the artifact-decision agent. Use the artifact decision section to validate whether the current pending/execution artifacts strengthen promotion, trigger rollback review, or should only be observed.
prompts.user_prompt: Symbol=SRC_ROOT_CARRY_LONG_220646 artifact_summary=actionable_artifacts=0 latest_promotable=None rule_breaks=0 consumed_trend=no_consumed_validation consumed_targets=[] consumed_trend_status=no_consumed_validation consumed_trend_reason=no_consumed_artifacts highlighted_actions=["learning_semantics=class=positive_executed success_credit=1.000 observation_weight=1.000"] top_factor_trends=[] top_family_trends=[] top_rule_break_effects=[] top_consumed_trends=[]

Do not ignore rule-break effects when artifact review versions changed
Use consumed validation trends when realized artifact outcomes are available
Name the artifact-driven factor/family targets before recommending code edits

prompts.user_prompt: Symbol=SRC_ROOT_CARRY_LONG_220646 entry_quality=medium factor_alignment=bullish factor_uncertainty=high realized_outcome=win structural_learning_semantics=class=positive_executed success_credit=1.000 observation_weight=1.000 feedback_records_applied=1 updated_trade_outcome={"breakeven": 0.056810922405480205, "loss": 0.45741719237177164, "win": 0.48577188522274806} iteration_queue=[]
success_criteria: If duplicate_feedback_skipped is true, do not infer a new learning event
If factor_alignment and realized_outcome disagree repeatedly, prioritize evidence-mapping review or factor replacement
If updated_trade_outcome improves while factor scores stay weak, review BBN calibration before editing factor code

prompts.objective: Select which factors to keep, tune, observe, or replace.
prompts.system_prompt: You are the factor-iteration agent. Use only the supplied scorecards and feedback summary to decide which factor edits are justified. Do not invent success criteria; follow the thresholds embedded in each factor prompt.
prompts.user_prompt: Symbol=SRC_ROOT_CARRY_LONG_220646 top_scorecards=[] iteration_queue=[] feedback_summary=records:35 wins:17 losses:18 avg_pnl:0.001538 factor_success_rates:{}
success_criteria: Prioritize replace > tune > observe > keep
Only recommend replacing a factor when its action is replace or replacement_candidate=true
Use the factor-specific agent prompt as the acceptance rule for the next iteration

prompts.objective: Review which factors are failing by regime and whether weight updates should be trusted.
prompts.system_prompt: You are the feedback-diagnostics agent. Compare factor success rates, grading, and weaknesses. Focus on regime-conditional failure and persistent underperformance.
prompts.user_prompt: Symbol=SRC_ROOT_CARRY_LONG_220646 feedback_total=35 avg_pnl=0.001538 weak_factors=[]
success_criteria: Flag factors with narrow regime coverage or unstable walk-forward
Do not promote a weaker factor just because it has higher recent win rate on small sample

prompts.objective: Review whether the realized update materially changed model state.
prompts.system_prompt: You are the update-diff agent. Use the trade_outcome probability deltas and factor score deltas to judge whether this realized result should change factor code, evidence mapping, or neither.
prompts.user_prompt: Symbol=SRC_ROOT_CARRY_LONG_220646 duplicate_feedback_skipped=false trade_outcome_deltas=[ProbabilityDiff { state: "breakeven", previous: Some(0.06312324711720023), new: 0.056810922405480205, delta: -0.006312324711720024 }, ProbabilityDiff { state: "loss", previous: Some(0.508241324857524), new: 0.45741719237177164, delta: -0.050824132485752405 }, ProbabilityDiff { state: "win", previous: Some(0.42863542802527566), new: 0.48577188522274806, delta: 0.0571364571974724 }] factor_score_deltas=[]
success_criteria: If duplicate_feedback_skipped is true, recommend no model change
If outcome probabilities changed materially but factor scores did not, investigate BBN evidence mapping

prompts.objective: Review artifact-driven actions and ensure they align with the next code or model iteration.
prompts.system_prompt: You are the artifact-decision agent. Use the artifact decision section to validate whether the current pending/execution artifacts strengthen promotion, trigger rollback review, or should only be observed.
prompts.user_prompt: Symbol=SRC_ROOT_CARRY_LONG_220646 artifact_summary=actionable_artifacts=0 latest_promotable=None rule_breaks=0 consumed_trend=no_consumed_validation consumed_targets=[] consumed_trend_status=no_consumed_validation consumed_trend_reason=no_consumed_artifacts highlighted_actions=["learning_semantics=class=positive_executed success_credit=1.000 observation_weight=1.000"] top_factor_trends=[] top_family_trends=[] top_rule_break_effects=[] top_consumed_trends=[]
success_criteria: Explicitly state whether artifact evidence strengthens promotion, rollback review, or observation only
Do not ignore rule-break effects when artifact review versions changed
Use consumed validation trends when realized artifact outcomes are available
Name the artifact-driven factor/family targets before recommending code edits

prompts.objective: Decide whether a factor iteration is strong enough to promote.
prompts.system_prompt: You are the promotion-gate agent. Only approve factor promotion when score deltas, grading, and supporting metrics clear the configured improvement thresholds. Reject cosmetic ranking changes.
prompts.user_prompt: Symbol=SRC_ROOT_CARRY_LONG_220646 thresholds={promotion_min_score_delta:0.100, promotion_min_score:0.700} top_rankings=[] score_deltas=[] learning_semantics=class=positive_executed success_credit=1.000 observation_weight=1.000
success_criteria: Only promote replace/tune outcomes when score delta is material and stability is not worse
If trade_count is low or dataset coverage changed, recommend holdout validation before promotion
Use learning_semantics to distinguish full-credit, fractional-credit, and no-credit feedback before approving promotion or rollback.

prompts.objective: Decide whether recent changes should be rolled back or isolated.
prompts.system_prompt: You are the rollback-review agent. Look for score degradation, action downgrades, and harmful probability shifts. Recommend rollback when the latest iteration weakened factor quality or destabilized outcome calibration.
prompts.user_prompt: Symbol=SRC_ROOT_CARRY_LONG_220646 thresholds={rollback_score_delta:-0.100, rollback_probability_delta:0.100} score_deltas=[] trade_outcome_deltas=[ProbabilityDiff { state: "breakeven", previous: Some(0.06312324711720023), new: 0.056810922405480205, delta: -0.006312324711720024 }, ProbabilityDiff { state: "loss", previous: Some(0.508241324857524), new: 0.45741719237177164, delta: -0.050824132485752405 }, ProbabilityDiff { state: "win", previous: Some(0.42863542802527566), new: 0.48577188522274806, delta: 0.0571364571974724 }] learning_semantics=class=positive_executed success_credit=1.000 observation_weight=1.000
success_criteria: Recommend rollback when strong factors degrade materially or outcome calibration shifts against realized performance
If only one factor family regressed, prefer targeted rollback over full revert
Use learning_semantics to distinguish full-credit, fractional-credit, and no-credit feedback before approving promotion or rollback.

prompts.user_prompt: Symbol=SRC_ROOT_CARRY_LONG_220646 artifact_summary=actionable_artifacts=0 latest_promotable=None rule_breaks=0 consumed_trend=no_consumed_validation consumed_targets=[] consumed_trend_status=no_consumed_validation consumed_trend_reason=no_consumed_artifacts highlighted_actions=["learning_semantics=class=positive_executed success_credit=1.000 observation_weight=1.000"] top_factor_trends=[] top_family_trends=[] top_rule_break_effects=[] top_consumed_trends=[]
success_criteria: Explicitly state whether artifact evidence strengthens promotion, rollback review, or observation only
Do not ignore rule-break effects when artifact review versions changed
Use consumed validation trends when realized artifact outcomes are available
Name the artifact-driven factor/family targets before recommending code edits

prompts.objective: Decide whether a factor iteration is strong enough to promote.
prompts.system_prompt: You are the promotion-gate agent. Only approve factor promotion when score deltas, grading, and supporting metrics clear the configured improvement thresholds. Reject cosmetic ranking changes.
prompts.user_prompt: Symbol=SRC_ROOT_CARRY_LONG_220646 thresholds={promotion_min_score_delta:0.100, promotion_min_score:0.700} top_rankings=[] score_deltas=[] learning_semantics=class=positive_executed success_credit=1.000 observation_weight=1.000
success_criteria: Only promote replace/tune outcomes when score delta is material and stability is not worse
If trade_count is low or dataset coverage changed, recommend holdout validation before promotion
Use learning_semantics to distinguish full-credit, fractional-credit, and no-credit feedback before approving promotion or rollback.

prompts.objective: Decide whether recent changes should be rolled back or isolated.
prompts.system_prompt: You are the rollback-review agent. Look for score degradation, action downgrades, and harmful probability shifts. Recommend rollback when the latest iteration weakened factor quality or destabilized outcome calibration.
prompts.user_prompt: Symbol=SRC_ROOT_CARRY_LONG_220646 thresholds={rollback_score_delta:-0.100, rollback_probability_delta:0.100} score_deltas=[] trade_outcome_deltas=[ProbabilityDiff { state: "breakeven", previous: Some(0.04601684714843897), new: 0.041415162433595075, delta: -0.004601684714843894 }, ProbabilityDiff { state: "loss", previous: Some(0.4705079258211351), new: 0.4234571332390216, delta: -0.047050792582113476 }, ProbabilityDiff { state: "win", previous: Some(0.48347522703042595), new: 0.5351277043273833, delta: 0.05165247729695738 }] learning_semantics=class=positive_executed success_credit=1.000 observation_weight=1.000
success_criteria: Recommend rollback when strong factors degrade materially or outcome calibration shifts against realized performance
If only one factor family regressed, prefer targeted rollback over full revert
Use learning_semantics to distinguish full-credit, fractional-credit, and no-credit feedback before approving promotion or rollback.

agent_prompts.workflow: Use the realized update for SRC_ROOT_CARRY_LONG_220646 to review whether the latest result should change factor weights, factor evidence interpretation, or future trade acceptance thresholds.

prompts.objective: Audit whether the dataset and command context are sufficient for trustworthy iteration.
prompts.system_prompt: You are the dataset-audit agent. Check whether the current dataset scope, paired market coverage, and command context are sufficient before making factor or model changes.
prompts.user_prompt: Symbol=SRC_ROOT_CARRY_LONG_220646 data_path=update-command paired_data_path=None candles=1 paired_candles=None source_command=update
success_criteria: Flag low sample size or missing paired-market evidence before approving major factor changes
If this run is not comparable to prior runs, tell the next agent not to over-interpret score deltas

prompts.objective: Review the newly realized outcome and decide what the next agent iteration should target.
prompts.system_prompt: You are the realized-feedback agent. Use the updated trade_outcome distribution plus factor scorecards to decide whether the latest result strengthens confidence, exposes a factor weakness, or suggests a problem in evidence mapping.
prompts.user_prompt: Symbol=SRC_ROOT_CARRY_LONG_220646 entry_quality=medium factor_alignment=bullish factor_uncertainty=low realized_outcome=win structural_learning_semantics=class=positive_executed success_credit=1.000 observation_weight=1.000 feedback_records_applied=1 updated_trade_outcome={"breakeven": 0.02717248807268173, "loss": 0.5345331721201999, "win": 0.4382943398071183} iteration_queue=[]
success_criteria: If duplicate_feedback_skipped is true, do not infer a new learning event
If factor_alignment and realized_outcome disagree repeatedly, prioritize evidence-mapping review or factor replacement
If updated_trade_outcome improves while factor scores stay weak, review BBN calibration before editing factor code

prompts.objective: Select which factors to keep, tune, observe, or replace.
prompts.system_prompt: You are the factor-iteration agent. Use only the supplied scorecards and feedback summary to decide which factor edits are justified. Do not invent success criteria; follow the thresholds embedded in each factor prompt.
prompts.user_prompt: Symbol=SRC_ROOT_CARRY_LONG_220646 top_scorecards=[] iteration_queue=[] feedback_summary=records:42 wins:21 losses:21 avg_pnl:0.000847 factor_success_rates:{}
success_criteria: Prioritize replace > tune > observe > keep
Only recommend replacing a factor when its action is replace or replacement_candidate=true
Use the factor-specific agent prompt as the acceptance rule for the next iteration

prompts.objective: Review which factors are failing by regime and whether weight updates should be trusted.
prompts.system_prompt: You are the feedback-diagnostics agent. Compare factor success rates, grading, and weaknesses. Focus on regime-conditional failure and persistent underperformance.
prompts.user_prompt: Symbol=SRC_ROOT_CARRY_LONG_220646 feedback_total=42 avg_pnl=0.000847 weak_factors=[]
success_criteria: Flag factors with narrow regime coverage or unstable walk-forward
Do not promote a weaker factor just because it has higher recent win rate on small sample

prompts.objective: Review whether the realized update materially changed model state.
prompts.system_prompt: You are the update-diff agent. Use the trade_outcome probability deltas and factor score deltas to judge whether this realized result should change factor code, evidence mapping, or neither.
prompts.user_prompt: Symbol=SRC_ROOT_CARRY_LONG_220646 duplicate_feedback_skipped=false trade_outcome_deltas=[ProbabilityDiff { state: "breakeven", previous: Some(0.03019165341409081), new: 0.02717248807268173, delta: -0.003019165341409079 }, ProbabilityDiff { state: "loss", previous: Some(0.5939257468002221), new: 0.5345331721201999, delta: -0.059392574680022236 }, ProbabilityDiff { state: "win", previous: Some(0.375882599785687), new: 0.4382943398071183, delta: 0.062411740021431295 }] factor_score_deltas=[]
success_criteria: If duplicate_feedback_skipped is true, recommend no model change
If outcome probabilities changed materially but factor scores did not, investigate BBN evidence mapping

prompts.objective: Review artifact-driven actions and ensure they align with the next code or model iteration.
prompts.system_prompt: You are the artifact-decision agent. Use the artifact decision section to validate whether the current pending/execution artifacts strengthen promotion, trigger rollback review, or should only be observed.
prompts.user_prompt: Symbol=SRC_ROOT_CARRY_LONG_220646 artifact_summary=actionable_artifacts=0 latest_promotable=None rule_breaks=0 consumed_trend=no_consumed_validation consumed_targets=[] consumed_trend_status=no_consumed_validation consumed_trend_reason=no_consumed_artifacts highlighted_actions=["learning_semantics=class=positive_executed success_credit=1.000 observation_weight=1.000"] top_factor_trends=[] top_family_trends=[] top_rule_break_effects=[] top_consumed_trends=[]
success_criteria: Explicitly state whether artifact evidence strengthens promotion, rollback review, or observation only
Do not ignore rule-break effects when artifact review versions changed
Use consumed validation trends when realized artifact outcomes are available
Name the artifact-driven factor/family targets before recommending code edits

prompts.objective: Decide whether a factor iteration is strong enough to promote.
prompts.system_prompt: You are the promotion-gate agent. Only approve factor promotion when score deltas, grading, and supporting metrics clear the configured improvement thresholds. Reject cosmetic ranking changes.
prompts.user_prompt: Symbol=SRC_ROOT_CARRY_LONG_220646 thresholds={promotion_min_score_delta:0.100, promotion_min_score:0.700} top_rankings=[] score_deltas=[] learning_semantics=class=positive_executed success_credit=1.000 observation_weight=1.000
success_criteria: Only promote replace/tune outcomes when score delta is material and stability is not worse
If trade_count is low or dataset coverage changed, recommend holdout validation before promotion
Use learning_semantics to distinguish full-credit, fractional-credit, and no-credit feedback before approving promotion or rollback.

prompts.objective: Decide whether recent changes should be rolled back or isolated.
prompts.system_prompt: You are the rollback-review agent. Look for score degradation, action downgrades, and harmful probability shifts. Recommend rollback when the latest iteration weakened factor quality or destabilized outcome calibration.
prompts.user_prompt: Symbol=SRC_ROOT_CARRY_LONG_220646 thresholds={rollback_score_delta:-0.100, rollback_probability_delta:0.100} score_deltas=[] trade_outcome_deltas=[ProbabilityDiff { state: "breakeven", previous: Some(0.03019165341409081), new: 0.02717248807268173, delta: -0.003019165341409079 }, ProbabilityDiff { state: "loss", previous: Some(0.5939257468002221), new: 0.5345331721201999, delta: -0.059392574680022236 }, ProbabilityDiff { state: "win", previous: Some(0.375882599785687), new: 0.4382943398071183, delta: 0.062411740021431295 }] learning_semantics=class=positive_executed success_credit=1.000 observation_weight=1.000
success_criteria: Recommend rollback when strong factors degrade materially or outcome calibration shifts against realized performance
If only one factor family regressed, prefer targeted rollback over full revert
Use learning_semantics to distinguish full-credit, fractional-credit, and no-credit feedback before approving promotion or rollback.

success_criteria: Flag factors with narrow regime coverage or unstable walk-forward
Do not promote a weaker factor just because it has higher recent win rate on small sample

prompts.objective: Review whether the realized update materially changed model state.
prompts.system_prompt: You are the update-diff agent. Use the trade_outcome probability deltas and factor score deltas to judge whether this realized result should change factor code, evidence mapping, or neither.
prompts.user_prompt: Symbol=SRC_ROOT_CARRY_LONG_220646 duplicate_feedback_skipped=false trade_outcome_deltas=[ProbabilityDiff { state: "breakeven", previous: Some(0.022009715338872204), new: 0.019808743804984985, delta: -0.0022009715338872186 }, ProbabilityDiff { state: "loss", previous: Some(0.522971869417362), new: 0.47067468247562577, delta: -0.052297186941736185 }, ProbabilityDiff { state: "win", previous: Some(0.45501841524376585), new: 0.5095165737193893, delta: 0.05449815847562345 }] factor_score_deltas=[]
success_criteria: If duplicate_feedback_skipped is true, recommend no model change
If outcome probabilities changed materially but factor scores did not, investigate BBN evidence mapping

prompts.objective: Review artifact-driven actions and ensure they align with the next code or model iteration.
prompts.system_prompt: You are the artifact-decision agent. Use the artifact decision section to validate whether the current pending/execution artifacts strengthen promotion, trigger rollback review, or should only be observed.
prompts.user_prompt: Symbol=SRC_ROOT_CARRY_LONG_220646 artifact_summary=actionable_artifacts=0 latest_promotable=None rule_breaks=0 consumed_trend=no_consumed_validation consumed_targets=[] consumed_trend_status=no_consumed_validation consumed_trend_reason=no_consumed_artifacts highlighted_actions=["learning_semantics=class=positive_executed success_credit=1.000 observation_weight=1.000"] top_factor_trends=[] top_family_trends=[] top_rule_break_effects=[] top_consumed_trends=[]
success_criteria: Explicitly state whether artifact evidence strengthens promotion, rollback review, or observation only
Do not ignore rule-break effects when artifact review versions changed
Use consumed validation trends when realized artifact outcomes are available
Name the artifact-driven factor/family targets before recommending code edits

prompts.objective: Decide whether a factor iteration is strong enough to promote.
prompts.system_prompt: You are the promotion-gate agent. Only approve factor promotion when score deltas, grading, and supporting metrics clear the configured improvement thresholds. Reject cosmetic ranking changes.
prompts.user_prompt: Symbol=SRC_ROOT_CARRY_LONG_220646 thresholds={promotion_min_score_delta:0.100, promotion_min_score:0.700} top_rankings=[] score_deltas=[] learning_semantics=class=positive_executed success_credit=1.000 observation_weight=1.000
success_criteria: Only promote replace/tune outcomes when score delta is material and stability is not worse
If trade_count is low or dataset coverage changed, recommend holdout validation before promotion
Use learning_semantics to distinguish full-credit, fractional-credit, and no-credit feedback before approving promotion or rollback.

prompts.objective: Decide whether recent changes should be rolled back or isolated.
prompts.system_prompt: You are the rollback-review agent. Look for score degradation, action downgrades, and harmful probability shifts. Recommend rollback when the latest iteration weakened factor quality or destabilized outcome calibration.
prompts.user_prompt: Symbol=SRC_ROOT_CARRY_LONG_220646 thresholds={rollback_score_delta:-0.100, rollback_probability_delta:0.100} score_deltas=[] trade_outcome_deltas=[ProbabilityDiff { state: "breakeven", previous: Some(0.022009715338872204), new: 0.019808743804984985, delta: -0.0022009715338872186 }, ProbabilityDiff { state: "loss", previous: Some(0.522971869417362), new: 0.47067468247562577, delta: -0.052297186941736185 }, ProbabilityDiff { state: "win", previous: Some(0.45501841524376585), new: 0.5095165737193893, delta: 0.05449815847562345 }] learning_semantics=class=positive_executed success_credit=1.000 observation_weight=1.000
success_criteria: Recommend rollback when strong factors degrade materially or outcome calibration shifts against realized performance
If only one factor family regressed, prefer targeted rollback over full revert
Use learning_semantics to distinguish full-credit, fractional-credit, and no-credit feedback before approving promotion or rollback.

success_criteria: Recommend rollback when strong factors degrade materially or outcome calibration shifts against realized performance

prompts.objective: Audit whether the dataset and command context are sufficient for trustworthy iteration.

prompts.objective: Review the newly realized outcome and decide what the next agent iteration should target.
prompts.system_prompt: You are the realized-feedback agent. Use the updated trade_outcome distribution plus factor scorecards to decide whether the latest result strengthens confidence, exposes a factor weakness, or suggests a problem in evidence mapping.
prompts.user_prompt: Symbol=SRC_ROOT_CARRY_LONG_220646 entry_quality=medium factor_alignment=bullish factor_uncertainty=low realized_outcome=win structural_learning_semantics=class=positive_executed success_credit=1.000 observation_weight=1.000 feedback_records_applied=1 updated_trade_outcome={"breakeven": 0.012996516810450647, "loss": 0.47980965917225804, "win": 0.5071938240172914} iteration_queue=[]

If factor_alignment and realized_outcome disagree repeatedly, prioritize evidence-mapping review or factor replacement
If updated_trade_outcome improves while factor scores stay weak, review BBN calibration before editing factor code

prompts.objective: Select which factors to keep, tune, observe, or replace.
prompts.system_prompt: You are the factor-iteration agent. Use only the supplied scorecards and feedback summary to decide which factor edits are justified. Do not invent success criteria; follow the thresholds embedded in each factor prompt.
prompts.user_prompt: Symbol=SRC_ROOT_CARRY_LONG_220646 top_scorecards=[] iteration_queue=[] feedback_summary=records:49 wins:25 losses:24 avg_pnl:0.000845 factor_success_rates:{}
success_criteria: Prioritize replace > tune > observe > keep
Only recommend replacing a factor when its action is replace or replacement_candidate=true
Use the factor-specific agent prompt as the acceptance rule for the next iteration

prompts.objective: Review which factors are failing by regime and whether weight updates should be trusted.
prompts.system_prompt: You are the feedback-diagnostics agent. Compare factor success rates, grading, and weaknesses. Focus on regime-conditional failure and persistent underperformance.
prompts.user_prompt: Symbol=SRC_ROOT_CARRY_LONG_220646 feedback_total=49 avg_pnl=0.000845 weak_factors=[]
success_criteria: Flag factors with narrow regime coverage or unstable walk-forward
Do not promote a weaker factor just because it has higher recent win rate on small sample

prompts.objective: Review whether the realized update materially changed model state.
prompts.system_prompt: You are the update-diff agent. Use the trade_outcome probability deltas and factor score deltas to judge whether this realized result should change factor code, evidence mapping, or neither.

success_criteria: If duplicate_feedback_skipped is true, recommend no model change
If outcome probabilities changed materially but factor scores did not, investigate BBN evidence mapping

prompts.objective: Review artifact-driven actions and ensure they align with the next code or model iteration.
prompts.system_prompt: You are the artifact-decision agent. Use the artifact decision section to validate whether the current pending/execution artifacts strengthen promotion, trigger rollback review, or should only be observed.

prompts.user_prompt: Symbol=SRC_ROOT_CARRY_LONG_220646 entry_quality=medium factor_alignment=bullish factor_uncertainty=low realized_outcome=win structural_learning_semantics=class=positive_executed success_credit=1.000 observation_weight=1.000 feedback_records_applied=1 updated_trade_outcome={"breakeven": 0.009474460754818522, "loss": 0.43078124153657615, "win": 0.5597442977086053} iteration_queue=[]
success_criteria: If duplicate_feedback_skipped is true, do not infer a new learning event
If factor_alignment and realized_outcome disagree repeatedly, prioritize evidence-mapping review or factor replacement
If updated_trade_outcome improves while factor scores stay weak, review BBN calibration before editing factor code

prompts.objective: Select which factors to keep, tune, observe, or replace.
prompts.system_prompt: You are the factor-iteration agent. Use only the supplied scorecards and feedback summary to decide which factor edits are justified. Do not invent success criteria; follow the thresholds embedded in each factor prompt.
prompts.user_prompt: Symbol=SRC_ROOT_CARRY_LONG_220646 top_scorecards=[] iteration_queue=[] feedback_summary=records:52 wins:27 losses:25 avg_pnl:0.001616 factor_success_rates:{}
success_criteria: Prioritize replace > tune > observe > keep
Only recommend replacing a factor when its action is replace or replacement_candidate=true
Use the factor-specific agent prompt as the acceptance rule for the next iteration

prompts.objective: Review which factors are failing by regime and whether weight updates should be trusted.
prompts.system_prompt: You are the feedback-diagnostics agent. Compare factor success rates, grading, and weaknesses. Focus on regime-conditional failure and persistent underperformance.
prompts.user_prompt: Symbol=SRC_ROOT_CARRY_LONG_220646 feedback_total=52 avg_pnl=0.001616 weak_factors=[]
success_criteria: Flag factors with narrow regime coverage or unstable walk-forward
Do not promote a weaker factor just because it has higher recent win rate on small sample

prompts.objective: Review whether the realized update materially changed model state.
prompts.system_prompt: You are the update-diff agent. Use the trade_outcome probability deltas and factor score deltas to judge whether this realized result should change factor code, evidence mapping, or neither.
prompts.user_prompt: Symbol=SRC_ROOT_CARRY_LONG_220646 duplicate_feedback_skipped=false trade_outcome_deltas=[ProbabilityDiff { state: "breakeven", previous: Some(0.010527178616465025), new: 0.009474460754818522, delta: -0.0010527178616465023 }, ProbabilityDiff { state: "loss", previous: Some(0.47864582392952904), new: 0.43078124153657615, delta: -0.04786458239295288 }, ProbabilityDiff { state: "win", previous: Some(0.510826997454006), new: 0.5597442977086053, delta: 0.048917300254599394 }] factor_score_deltas=[]
success_criteria: If duplicate_feedback_skipped is true, recommend no model change
If outcome probabilities changed materially but factor scores did not, investigate BBN evidence mapping

prompts.objective: Review artifact-driven actions and ensure they align with the next code or model iteration.
prompts.system_prompt: You are the artifact-decision agent. Use the artifact decision section to validate whether the current pending/execution artifacts strengthen promotion, trigger rollback review, or should only be observed.
prompts.user_prompt: Symbol=SRC_ROOT_CARRY_LONG_220646 artifact_summary=actionable_artifacts=0 latest_promotable=None rule_breaks=0 consumed_trend=no_consumed_validation consumed_targets=[] consumed_trend_status=no_consumed_validation consumed_trend_reason=no_consumed_artifacts highlighted_actions=["learning_semantics=class=positive_executed success_credit=1.000 observation_weight=1.000"] top_factor_trends=[] top_family_trends=[] top_rule_break_effects=[] top_consumed_trends=[]
success_criteria: Explicitly state whether artifact evidence strengthens promotion, rollback review, or observation only
Do not ignore rule-break effects when artifact review versions changed
Use consumed validation trends when realized artifact outcomes are available
Name the artifact-driven factor/family targets before recommending code edits

prompts.objective: Decide whether a factor iteration is strong enough to promote.
prompts.system_prompt: You are the promotion-gate agent. Only approve factor promotion when score deltas, grading, and supporting metrics clear the configured improvement thresholds. Reject cosmetic ranking changes.
prompts.user_prompt: Symbol=SRC_ROOT_CARRY_LONG_220646 thresholds={promotion_min_score_delta:0.100, promotion_min_score:0.700} top_rankings=[] score_deltas=[] learning_semantics=class=positive_executed success_credit=1.000 observation_weight=1.000
success_criteria: Only promote replace/tune outcomes when score delta is material and stability is not worse
If trade_count is low or dataset coverage changed, recommend holdout validation before promotion
Use learning_semantics to distinguish full-credit, fractional-credit, and no-credit feedback before approving promotion or rollback.

prompts.objective: Decide whether recent changes should be rolled back or isolated.
prompts.system_prompt: You are the rollback-review agent. Look for score degradation, action downgrades, and harmful probability shifts. Recommend rollback when the latest iteration weakened factor quality or destabilized outcome calibration.
prompts.user_prompt: Symbol=SRC_ROOT_CARRY_LONG_220646 thresholds={rollback_score_delta:-0.100, rollback_probability_delta:0.100} score_deltas=[] trade_outcome_deltas=[ProbabilityDiff { state: "breakeven", previous: Some(0.010527178616465025), new: 0.009474460754818522, delta: -0.0010527178616465023 }, ProbabilityDiff { state: "loss", previous: Some(0.47864582392952904), new: 0.43078124153657615, delta: -0.04786458239295288 }, ProbabilityDiff { state: "win", previous: Some(0.510826997454006), new: 0.5597442977086053, delta: 0.048917300254599394 }] learning_semantics=class=positive_executed success_credit=1.000 observation_weight=1.000
success_criteria: Recommend rollback when strong factors degrade materially or outcome calibration shifts against realized performance
If only one factor family regressed, prefer targeted rollback over full revert
Use learning_semantics to distinguish full-credit, fractional-credit, and no-credit feedback before approving promotion or rollback.

prompts.user_prompt: Symbol=SRC_ROOT_CARRY_LONG_220646 artifact_summary=actionable_artifacts=0 latest_promotable=None rule_breaks=0 consumed_trend=no_consumed_validation consumed_targets=[] consumed_trend_status=no_consumed_validation consumed_trend_reason=no_consumed_artifacts highlighted_actions=["learning_semantics=class=negative_executed success_credit=0.000 observation_weight=1.000"] top_factor_trends=[] top_family_trends=[] top_rule_break_effects=[] top_consumed_trends=[]
success_criteria: Explicitly state whether artifact evidence strengthens promotion, rollback review, or observation only
Do not ignore rule-break effects when artifact review versions changed
Use consumed validation trends when realized artifact outcomes are available
Name the artifact-driven factor/family targets before recommending code edits

prompts.objective: Decide whether a factor iteration is strong enough to promote.
prompts.system_prompt: You are the promotion-gate agent. Only approve factor promotion when score deltas, grading, and supporting metrics clear the configured improvement thresholds. Reject cosmetic ranking changes.
prompts.user_prompt: Symbol=SRC_ROOT_CARRY_LONG_220646 thresholds={promotion_min_score_delta:0.100, promotion_min_score:0.700} top_rankings=[] score_deltas=[] learning_semantics=class=negative_executed success_credit=0.000 observation_weight=1.000
success_criteria: Only promote replace/tune outcomes when score delta is material and stability is not worse
If trade_count is low or dataset coverage changed, recommend holdout validation before promotion
Use learning_semantics to distinguish full-credit, fractional-credit, and no-credit feedback before approving promotion or rollback.

prompts.objective: Decide whether recent changes should be rolled back or isolated.
prompts.system_prompt: You are the rollback-review agent. Look for score degradation, action downgrades, and harmful probability shifts. Recommend rollback when the latest iteration weakened factor quality or destabilized outcome calibration.
prompts.user_prompt: Symbol=SRC_ROOT_CARRY_LONG_220646 thresholds={rollback_score_delta:-0.100, rollback_probability_delta:0.100} score_deltas=[] trade_outcome_deltas=[ProbabilityDiff { state: "breakeven", previous: Some(0.007674313211403003), new: 0.006906881890262703, delta: -0.0007674313211403 }, ProbabilityDiff { state: "loss", previous: Some(0.4389328056446268), new: 0.49503952508016413, delta: 0.056106719435537356 }, ProbabilityDiff { state: "win", previous: Some(0.5533928811439703), new: 0.4980535930295733, delta: -0.055339288114397034 }] learning_semantics=class=negative_executed success_credit=0.000 observation_weight=1.000
success_criteria: Recommend rollback when strong factors degrade materially or outcome calibration shifts against realized performance
If only one factor family regressed, prefer targeted rollback over full revert
Use learning_semantics to distinguish full-credit, fractional-credit, and no-credit feedback before approving promotion or rollback.

agent_prompts.workflow: Use the realized update for SRC_ROOT_CARRY_LONG_220646 to review whether the latest result should change factor weights, factor evidence interpretation, or future trade acceptance thresholds.

prompts.objective: Audit whether the dataset and command context are sufficient for trustworthy iteration.
prompts.system_prompt: You are the dataset-audit agent. Check whether the current dataset scope, paired market coverage, and command context are sufficient before making factor or model changes.
prompts.user_prompt: Symbol=SRC_ROOT_CARRY_LONG_220646 data_path=update-command paired_data_path=None candles=1 paired_candles=None source_command=update
success_criteria: Flag low sample size or missing paired-market evidence before approving major factor changes
If this run is not comparable to prior runs, tell the next agent not to over-interpret score deltas

prompts.objective: Review the newly realized outcome and decide what the next agent iteration should target.
prompts.system_prompt: You are the realized-feedback agent. Use the updated trade_outcome distribution plus factor scorecards to decide whether the latest result strengthens confidence, exposes a factor weakness, or suggests a problem in evidence mapping.
prompts.user_prompt: Symbol=SRC_ROOT_CARRY_LONG_220646 entry_quality=medium factor_alignment=bullish factor_uncertainty=low realized_outcome=win structural_learning_semantics=class=positive_executed success_credit=1.000 observation_weight=1.000 feedback_records_applied=1 updated_trade_outcome={"breakeven": 0.00453160520820136, "loss": 0.40579543240509564, "win": 0.5896729623867031} iteration_queue=[]
success_criteria: If duplicate_feedback_skipped is true, do not infer a new learning event
If factor_alignment and realized_outcome disagree repeatedly, prioritize evidence-mapping review or factor replacement
If updated_trade_outcome improves while factor scores stay weak, review BBN calibration before editing factor code

prompts.objective: Select which factors to keep, tune, observe, or replace.
prompts.system_prompt: You are the factor-iteration agent. Use only the supplied scorecards and feedback summary to decide which factor edits are justified. Do not invent success criteria; follow the thresholds embedded in each factor prompt.
prompts.user_prompt: Symbol=SRC_ROOT_CARRY_LONG_220646 top_scorecards=[] iteration_queue=[] feedback_summary=records:59 wins:31 losses:28 avg_pnl:0.000849 factor_success_rates:{}
success_criteria: Prioritize replace > tune > observe > keep
Only recommend replacing a factor when its action is replace or replacement_candidate=true
Use the factor-specific agent prompt as the acceptance rule for the next iteration

prompts.objective: Review which factors are failing by regime and whether weight updates should be trusted.
prompts.system_prompt: You are the feedback-diagnostics agent. Compare factor success rates, grading, and weaknesses. Focus on regime-conditional failure and persistent underperformance.
prompts.user_prompt: Symbol=SRC_ROOT_CARRY_LONG_220646 feedback_total=59 avg_pnl=0.000849 weak_factors=[]
success_criteria: Flag factors with narrow regime coverage or unstable walk-forward
Do not promote a weaker factor just because it has higher recent win rate on small sample

prompts.objective: Review whether the realized update materially changed model state.
prompts.system_prompt: You are the update-diff agent. Use the trade_outcome probability deltas and factor score deltas to judge whether this realized result should change factor code, evidence mapping, or neither.
prompts.user_prompt: Symbol=SRC_ROOT_CARRY_LONG_220646 duplicate_feedback_skipped=false trade_outcome_deltas=[ProbabilityDiff { state: "breakeven", previous: Some(0.005035116898001511), new: 0.00453160520820136, delta: -0.0005035116898001509 }, ProbabilityDiff { state: "loss", previous: Some(0.4508838137834396), new: 0.40579543240509564, delta: -0.04508838137834398 }, ProbabilityDiff { state: "win", previous: Some(0.5440810693185589), new: 0.5896729623867031, delta: 0.04559189306814415 }] factor_score_deltas=[]
success_criteria: If duplicate_feedback_skipped is true, recommend no model change
If outcome probabilities changed materially but factor scores did not, investigate BBN evidence mapping

prompts.objective: Review artifact-driven actions and ensure they align with the next code or model iteration.
prompts.system_prompt: You are the artifact-decision agent. Use the artifact decision section to validate whether the current pending/execution artifacts strengthen promotion, trigger rollback review, or should only be observed.
prompts.user_prompt: Symbol=SRC_ROOT_CARRY_LONG_220646 artifact_summary=actionable_artifacts=0 latest_promotable=None rule_breaks=0 consumed_trend=no_consumed_validation consumed_targets=[] consumed_trend_status=no_consumed_validation consumed_trend_reason=no_consumed_artifacts highlighted_actions=["learning_semantics=class=positive_executed success_credit=1.000 observation_weight=1.000"] top_factor_trends=[] top_family_trends=[] top_rule_break_effects=[] top_consumed_trends=[]
success_criteria: Explicitly state whether artifact evidence strengthens promotion, rollback review, or observation only
Do not ignore rule-break effects when artifact review versions changed
Use consumed validation trends when realized artifact outcomes are available
Name the artifact-driven factor/family targets before recommending code edits

prompts.objective: Decide whether a factor iteration is strong enough to promote.
prompts.system_prompt: You are the promotion-gate agent. Only approve factor promotion when score deltas, grading, and supporting metrics clear the configured improvement thresholds. Reject cosmetic ranking changes.
prompts.user_prompt: Symbol=SRC_ROOT_CARRY_LONG_220646 thresholds={promotion_min_score_delta:0.100, promotion_min_score:0.700} top_rankings=[] score_deltas=[] learning_semantics=class=positive_executed success_credit=1.000 observation_weight=1.000
success_criteria: Only promote replace/tune outcomes when score delta is material and stability is not worse
If trade_count is low or dataset coverage changed, recommend holdout validation before promotion
Use learning_semantics to distinguish full-credit, fractional-credit, and no-credit feedback before approving promotion or rollback.

prompts.objective: Decide whether recent changes should be rolled back or isolated.
prompts.system_prompt: You are the rollback-review agent. Look for score degradation, action downgrades, and harmful probability shifts. Recommend rollback when the latest iteration weakened factor quality or destabilized outcome calibration.
prompts.user_prompt: Symbol=SRC_ROOT_CARRY_LONG_220646 thresholds={rollback_score_delta:-0.100, rollback_probability_delta:0.100} score_deltas=[] trade_outcome_deltas=[ProbabilityDiff { state: "breakeven", previous: Some(0.005035116898001511), new: 0.00453160520820136, delta: -0.0005035116898001509 }, ProbabilityDiff { state: "loss", previous: Some(0.4508838137834396), new: 0.40579543240509564, delta: -0.04508838137834398 }, ProbabilityDiff { state: "win", previous: Some(0.5440810693185589), new: 0.5896729623867031, delta: 0.04559189306814415 }] learning_semantics=class=positive_executed success_credit=1.000 observation_weight=1.000
success_criteria: Recommend rollback when strong factors degrade materially or outcome calibration shifts against realized performance
If only one factor family regressed, prefer targeted rollback over full revert
Use learning_semantics to distinguish full-credit, fractional-credit, and no-credit feedback before approving promotion or rollback.

prompts.user_prompt: Symbol=SRC_ROOT_CARRY_LONG_220646 feedback_total=62 avg_pnl=0.003285 weak_factors=[]
success_criteria: Flag factors with narrow regime coverage or unstable walk-forward
Do not promote a weaker factor just because it has higher recent win rate on small sample

prompts.objective: Review whether the realized update materially changed model state.
prompts.system_prompt: You are the update-diff agent. Use the trade_outcome probability deltas and factor score deltas to judge whether this realized result should change factor code, evidence mapping, or neither.
prompts.user_prompt: Symbol=SRC_ROOT_CARRY_LONG_220646 duplicate_feedback_skipped=false trade_outcome_deltas=[ProbabilityDiff { state: "breakeven", previous: Some(0.0036706002186431014), new: 0.0033035401967787914, delta: -0.00036706002186431006 }, ProbabilityDiff { state: "loss", previous: Some(0.32869430024812746), new: 0.2958248702233147, delta: -0.03286943002481274 }, ProbabilityDiff { state: "win", previous: Some(0.6676350995332294), new: 0.7008715895799065, delta: 0.03323649004667706 }] factor_score_deltas=[]
success_criteria: If duplicate_feedback_skipped is true, recommend no model change
If outcome probabilities changed materially but factor scores did not, investigate BBN evidence mapping

prompts.objective: Review artifact-driven actions and ensure they align with the next code or model iteration.
prompts.system_prompt: You are the artifact-decision agent. Use the artifact decision section to validate whether the current pending/execution artifacts strengthen promotion, trigger rollback review, or should only be observed.
prompts.user_prompt: Symbol=SRC_ROOT_CARRY_LONG_220646 artifact_summary=actionable_artifacts=0 latest_promotable=None rule_breaks=0 consumed_trend=no_consumed_validation consumed_targets=[] consumed_trend_status=no_consumed_validation consumed_trend_reason=no_consumed_artifacts highlighted_actions=["learning_semantics=class=positive_executed success_credit=1.000 observation_weight=1.000"] top_factor_trends=[] top_family_trends=[] top_rule_break_effects=[] top_consumed_trends=[]
success_criteria: Explicitly state whether artifact evidence strengthens promotion, rollback review, or observation only
Do not ignore rule-break effects when artifact review versions changed
Use consumed validation trends when realized artifact outcomes are available
Name the artifact-driven factor/family targets before recommending code edits

prompts.objective: Decide whether a factor iteration is strong enough to promote.
prompts.system_prompt: You are the promotion-gate agent. Only approve factor promotion when score deltas, grading, and supporting metrics clear the configured improvement thresholds. Reject cosmetic ranking changes.
prompts.user_prompt: Symbol=SRC_ROOT_CARRY_LONG_220646 thresholds={promotion_min_score_delta:0.100, promotion_min_score:0.700} top_rankings=[] score_deltas=[] learning_semantics=class=positive_executed success_credit=1.000 observation_weight=1.000
success_criteria: Only promote replace/tune outcomes when score delta is material and stability is not worse
If trade_count is low or dataset coverage changed, recommend holdout validation before promotion
Use learning_semantics to distinguish full-credit, fractional-credit, and no-credit feedback before approving promotion or rollback.

prompts.objective: Decide whether recent changes should be rolled back or isolated.
prompts.system_prompt: You are the rollback-review agent. Look for score degradation, action downgrades, and harmful probability shifts. Recommend rollback when the latest iteration weakened factor quality or destabilized outcome calibration.
prompts.user_prompt: Symbol=SRC_ROOT_CARRY_LONG_220646 thresholds={rollback_score_delta:-0.100, rollback_probability_delta:0.100} score_deltas=[] trade_outcome_deltas=[ProbabilityDiff { state: "breakeven", previous: Some(0.0036706002186431014), new: 0.0033035401967787914, delta: -0.00036706002186431006 }, ProbabilityDiff { state: "loss", previous: Some(0.32869430024812746), new: 0.2958248702233147, delta: -0.03286943002481274 }, ProbabilityDiff { state: "win", previous: Some(0.6676350995332294), new: 0.7008715895799065, delta: 0.03323649004667706 }] learning_semantics=class=positive_executed success_credit=1.000 observation_weight=1.000
success_criteria: Recommend rollback when strong factors degrade materially or outcome calibration shifts against realized performance
If only one factor family regressed, prefer targeted rollback over full revert
Use learning_semantics to distinguish full-credit, fractional-credit, and no-credit feedback before approving promotion or rollback.

success_criteria: Recommend rollback when strong factors degrade materially or outcome calibration shifts against realized performance

Use learning_semantics to distinguish full-credit, fractional-credit, and no-credit feedback before approving promotion or rollback.

prompts.objective: Audit whether the dataset and command context are sufficient for trustworthy iteration.

prompts.objective: Review the newly realized outcome and decide what the next agent iteration should target.
prompts.system_prompt: You are the realized-feedback agent. Use the updated trade_outcome distribution plus factor scorecards to decide whether the latest result strengthens confidence, exposes a factor weakness, or suggests a problem in evidence mapping.
prompts.user_prompt: Symbol=SRC_ROOT_CARRY_LONG_220646 entry_quality=medium factor_alignment=bullish factor_uncertainty=low realized_outcome=win structural_learning_semantics=class=positive_executed success_credit=1.000 observation_weight=1.000 feedback_records_applied=1 updated_trade_outcome={"breakeven": 0.0021674527231065653, "loss": 0.26699069735351677, "win": 0.7308418499233766} iteration_queue=[]

If factor_alignment and realized_outcome disagree repeatedly, prioritize evidence-mapping review or factor replacement
