prompts.objective: Select which factors to keep, tune, observe, or replace.
prompts.system_prompt: You are the factor-iteration agent. Use only the supplied scorecards and feedback summary to decide which factor edits are justified. Do not invent success criteria; follow the thresholds embedded in each factor prompt.
prompts.user_prompt: Symbol=SRC_ROOT_CARRY_LONG_220646 top_scorecards=[] iteration_queue=[] feedback_summary=records:66 wins:37 losses:29 avg_pnl:0.003828 factor_success_rates:{}
success_criteria: Prioritize replace > tune > observe > keep
Only recommend replacing a factor when its action is replace or replacement_candidate=true
Use the factor-specific agent prompt as the acceptance rule for the next iteration

prompts.objective: Review which factors are failing by regime and whether weight updates should be trusted.
prompts.system_prompt: You are the feedback-diagnostics agent. Compare factor success rates, grading, and weaknesses. Focus on regime-conditional failure and persistent underperformance.
prompts.user_prompt: Symbol=SRC_ROOT_CARRY_LONG_220646 feedback_total=66 avg_pnl=0.003828 weak_factors=[]
success_criteria: Flag factors with narrow regime coverage or unstable walk-forward
Do not promote a weaker factor just because it has higher recent win rate on small sample

prompts.objective: Review whether the realized update materially changed model state.
prompts.system_prompt: You are the update-diff agent. Use the trade_outcome probability deltas and factor score deltas to judge whether this realized result should change factor code, evidence mapping, or neither.

success_criteria: If duplicate_feedback_skipped is true, recommend no model change
If outcome probabilities changed materially but factor scores did not, investigate BBN evidence mapping

prompts.user_prompt: Symbol=SRC_ROOT_CARRY_LONG_220646 entry_quality=medium factor_alignment=bullish factor_uncertainty=low realized_outcome=win structural_learning_semantics=class=positive_executed success_credit=1.000 observation_weight=1.000 feedback_records_applied=1 updated_trade_outcome={"breakeven": 0.0015800730351446864, "loss": 0.28463621837071373, "win": 0.7137837085941416} iteration_queue=[]
success_criteria: If duplicate_feedback_skipped is true, do not infer a new learning event
If factor_alignment and realized_outcome disagree repeatedly, prioritize evidence-mapping review or factor replacement
If updated_trade_outcome improves while factor scores stay weak, review BBN calibration before editing factor code

prompts.objective: Select which factors to keep, tune, observe, or replace.
prompts.system_prompt: You are the factor-iteration agent. Use only the supplied scorecards and feedback summary to decide which factor edits are justified. Do not invent success criteria; follow the thresholds embedded in each factor prompt.
prompts.user_prompt: Symbol=SRC_ROOT_CARRY_LONG_220646 top_scorecards=[] iteration_queue=[] feedback_summary=records:69 wins:39 losses:30 avg_pnl:0.003990 factor_success_rates:{}
success_criteria: Prioritize replace > tune > observe > keep
Only recommend replacing a factor when its action is replace or replacement_candidate=true
Use the factor-specific agent prompt as the acceptance rule for the next iteration

prompts.objective: Review which factors are failing by regime and whether weight updates should be trusted.
prompts.system_prompt: You are the feedback-diagnostics agent. Compare factor success rates, grading, and weaknesses. Focus on regime-conditional failure and persistent underperformance.
prompts.user_prompt: Symbol=SRC_ROOT_CARRY_LONG_220646 feedback_total=69 avg_pnl=0.003990 weak_factors=[]
success_criteria: Flag factors with narrow regime coverage or unstable walk-forward
Do not promote a weaker factor just because it has higher recent win rate on small sample

prompts.objective: Review whether the realized update materially changed model state.
prompts.system_prompt: You are the update-diff agent. Use the trade_outcome probability deltas and factor score deltas to judge whether this realized result should change factor code, evidence mapping, or neither.
prompts.user_prompt: Symbol=SRC_ROOT_CARRY_LONG_220646 duplicate_feedback_skipped=false trade_outcome_deltas=[ProbabilityDiff { state: "breakeven", previous: Some(0.0017556367057163182), new: 0.0015800730351446864, delta: -0.00017556367057163175 }, ProbabilityDiff { state: "loss", previous: Some(0.31626246485634857), new: 0.28463621837071373, delta: -0.031626246485634835 }, ProbabilityDiff { state: "win", previous: Some(0.6819818984379351), new: 0.7137837085941416, delta: 0.031801810156206534 }] factor_score_deltas=[]
success_criteria: If duplicate_feedback_skipped is true, recommend no model change
If outcome probabilities changed materially but factor scores did not, investigate BBN evidence mapping

prompts.objective: Review artifact-driven actions and ensure they align with the next code or model iteration.
prompts.system_prompt: You are the artifact-decision agent. Use the artifact decision section to validate whether the current pending/execution artifacts strengthen promotion, trigger rollback review, or should only be observed.
prompts.user_prompt: Symbol=SRC_ROOT_CARRY_LONG_220646 artifact_summary=actionable_artifacts=0 latest_promotable=None rule_breaks=0 consumed_trend=no_consumed_validation consumed_targets=[] consumed_trend_status=no_consumed_validation consumed_trend_reason=no_consumed_artifacts highlighted_actions=["learning_semantics=class=positive_executed success_credit=1.000 observation_weight=1.000"] top_factor_trends=[] top_family_trends=[] top_rule_break_effects=[] top_consumed_trends=[]
success_criteria: Explicitly state whether artifact evidence strengthens promotion, rollback review, or observation only
Do not ignore rule-break effects when artifact review versions changed
Use consumed validation trends when realized artifact outcomes are available
Name the artifact-driven factor/family targets before recommending code edits

prompts.objective: Decide whether a factor iteration is strong enough to promote.
prompts.system_prompt: You are the promotion-gate agent. Only approve factor promotion when score deltas, grading, and supporting metrics clear the configured improvement thresholds. Reject cosmetic ranking changes.
prompts.user_prompt: Symbol=SRC_ROOT_CARRY_LONG_220646 thresholds={promotion_min_score_delta:0.100, promotion_min_score:0.700} top_rankings=[] score_deltas=[] learning_semantics=class=positive_executed success_credit=1.000 observation_weight=1.000
success_criteria: Only promote replace/tune outcomes when score delta is material and stability is not worse
If trade_count is low or dataset coverage changed, recommend holdout validation before promotion
Use learning_semantics to distinguish full-credit, fractional-credit, and no-credit feedback before approving promotion or rollback.

prompts.objective: Decide whether recent changes should be rolled back or isolated.
prompts.system_prompt: You are the rollback-review agent. Look for score degradation, action downgrades, and harmful probability shifts. Recommend rollback when the latest iteration weakened factor quality or destabilized outcome calibration.
prompts.user_prompt: Symbol=SRC_ROOT_CARRY_LONG_220646 thresholds={rollback_score_delta:-0.100, rollback_probability_delta:0.100} score_deltas=[] trade_outcome_deltas=[ProbabilityDiff { state: "breakeven", previous: Some(0.0017556367057163182), new: 0.0015800730351446864, delta: -0.00017556367057163175 }, ProbabilityDiff { state: "loss", previous: Some(0.31626246485634857), new: 0.28463621837071373, delta: -0.031626246485634835 }, ProbabilityDiff { state: "win", previous: Some(0.6819818984379351), new: 0.7137837085941416, delta: 0.031801810156206534 }] learning_semantics=class=positive_executed success_credit=1.000 observation_weight=1.000
success_criteria: Recommend rollback when strong factors degrade materially or outcome calibration shifts against realized performance
If only one factor family regressed, prefer targeted rollback over full revert
Use learning_semantics to distinguish full-credit, fractional-credit, and no-credit feedback before approving promotion or rollback.

prompts.user_prompt: Symbol=SRC_ROOT_CARRY_LONG_220646 artifact_summary=actionable_artifacts=0 latest_promotable=None rule_breaks=0 consumed_trend=no_consumed_validation consumed_targets=[] consumed_trend_status=no_consumed_validation consumed_trend_reason=no_consumed_artifacts highlighted_actions=["learning_semantics=class=negative_executed success_credit=0.000 observation_weight=1.000"] top_factor_trends=[] top_family_trends=[] top_rule_break_effects=[] top_consumed_trends=[]
success_criteria: Explicitly state whether artifact evidence strengthens promotion, rollback review, or observation only
Do not ignore rule-break effects when artifact review versions changed
Use consumed validation trends when realized artifact outcomes are available
Name the artifact-driven factor/family targets before recommending code edits

prompts.objective: Decide whether a factor iteration is strong enough to promote.
prompts.system_prompt: You are the promotion-gate agent. Only approve factor promotion when score deltas, grading, and supporting metrics clear the configured improvement thresholds. Reject cosmetic ranking changes.
prompts.user_prompt: Symbol=SRC_ROOT_CARRY_LONG_220646 thresholds={promotion_min_score_delta:0.100, promotion_min_score:0.700} top_rankings=[] score_deltas=[] learning_semantics=class=negative_executed success_credit=0.000 observation_weight=1.000
success_criteria: Only promote replace/tune outcomes when score delta is material and stability is not worse
If trade_count is low or dataset coverage changed, recommend holdout validation before promotion
Use learning_semantics to distinguish full-credit, fractional-credit, and no-credit feedback before approving promotion or rollback.

prompts.objective: Decide whether recent changes should be rolled back or isolated.
prompts.system_prompt: You are the rollback-review agent. Look for score degradation, action downgrades, and harmful probability shifts. Recommend rollback when the latest iteration weakened factor quality or destabilized outcome calibration.
prompts.user_prompt: Symbol=SRC_ROOT_CARRY_LONG_220646 thresholds={rollback_score_delta:-0.100, rollback_probability_delta:0.100} score_deltas=[] trade_outcome_deltas=[ProbabilityDiff { state: "breakeven", previous: Some(0.001279859158467196), new: 0.0011518732426204763, delta: -0.0001279859158467196 }, ProbabilityDiff { state: "loss", previous: Some(0.23055533688027816), new: 0.30749980319225034, delta: 0.07694446631197219 }, ProbabilityDiff { state: "win", previous: Some(0.7681648039612547), new: 0.6913483235651293, delta: -0.07681648039612543 }] learning_semantics=class=negative_executed success_credit=0.000 observation_weight=1.000
success_criteria: Recommend rollback when strong factors degrade materially or outcome calibration shifts against realized performance
If only one factor family regressed, prefer targeted rollback over full revert
Use learning_semantics to distinguish full-credit, fractional-credit, and no-credit feedback before approving promotion or rollback.

agent_prompts.workflow: Use the realized update for SRC_ROOT_CARRY_LONG_220646 to review whether the latest result should change factor weights, factor evidence interpretation, or future trade acceptance thresholds.

prompts.objective: Audit whether the dataset and command context are sufficient for trustworthy iteration.
prompts.system_prompt: You are the dataset-audit agent. Check whether the current dataset scope, paired market coverage, and command context are sufficient before making factor or model changes.
prompts.user_prompt: Symbol=SRC_ROOT_CARRY_LONG_220646 data_path=update-command paired_data_path=None candles=1 paired_candles=None source_command=update
success_criteria: Flag low sample size or missing paired-market evidence before approving major factor changes
If this run is not comparable to prior runs, tell the next agent not to over-interpret score deltas

prompts.objective: Review the newly realized outcome and decide what the next agent iteration should target.
prompts.system_prompt: You are the realized-feedback agent. Use the updated trade_outcome distribution plus factor scorecards to decide whether the latest result strengthens confidence, exposes a factor weakness, or suggests a problem in evidence mapping.
prompts.user_prompt: Symbol=SRC_ROOT_CARRY_LONG_220646 entry_quality=medium factor_alignment=bullish factor_uncertainty=low realized_outcome=win structural_learning_semantics=class=positive_executed success_credit=1.000 observation_weight=1.000 feedback_records_applied=1 updated_trade_outcome={"breakeven": 0.0007557440344832944, "loss": 0.3727506208744355, "win": 0.6264936350910812} iteration_queue=[]
success_criteria: If duplicate_feedback_skipped is true, do not infer a new learning event
If factor_alignment and realized_outcome disagree repeatedly, prioritize evidence-mapping review or factor replacement
If updated_trade_outcome improves while factor scores stay weak, review BBN calibration before editing factor code

prompts.objective: Select which factors to keep, tune, observe, or replace.
prompts.system_prompt: You are the factor-iteration agent. Use only the supplied scorecards and feedback summary to decide which factor edits are justified. Do not invent success criteria; follow the thresholds embedded in each factor prompt.
prompts.user_prompt: Symbol=SRC_ROOT_CARRY_LONG_220646 top_scorecards=[] iteration_queue=[] feedback_summary=records:76 wins:43 losses:33 avg_pnl:0.004155 factor_success_rates:{}
success_criteria: Prioritize replace > tune > observe > keep
Only recommend replacing a factor when its action is replace or replacement_candidate=true
Use the factor-specific agent prompt as the acceptance rule for the next iteration

prompts.objective: Review which factors are failing by regime and whether weight updates should be trusted.
prompts.system_prompt: You are the feedback-diagnostics agent. Compare factor success rates, grading, and weaknesses. Focus on regime-conditional failure and persistent underperformance.
prompts.user_prompt: Symbol=SRC_ROOT_CARRY_LONG_220646 feedback_total=76 avg_pnl=0.004155 weak_factors=[]
success_criteria: Flag factors with narrow regime coverage or unstable walk-forward
Do not promote a weaker factor just because it has higher recent win rate on small sample

prompts.objective: Review whether the realized update materially changed model state.
prompts.system_prompt: You are the update-diff agent. Use the trade_outcome probability deltas and factor score deltas to judge whether this realized result should change factor code, evidence mapping, or neither.
prompts.user_prompt: Symbol=SRC_ROOT_CARRY_LONG_220646 duplicate_feedback_skipped=false trade_outcome_deltas=[ProbabilityDiff { state: "breakeven", previous: Some(0.0008397155938703274), new: 0.0007557440344832944, delta: -8.397155938703296e-5 }, ProbabilityDiff { state: "loss", previous: Some(0.4141673565271506), new: 0.3727506208744355, delta: -0.041416735652715087 }, ProbabilityDiff { state: "win", previous: Some(0.5849929278789793), new: 0.6264936350910812, delta: 0.04150070721210197 }] factor_score_deltas=[]
success_criteria: If duplicate_feedback_skipped is true, recommend no model change
If outcome probabilities changed materially but factor scores did not, investigate BBN evidence mapping

prompts.objective: Review artifact-driven actions and ensure they align with the next code or model iteration.
prompts.system_prompt: You are the artifact-decision agent. Use the artifact decision section to validate whether the current pending/execution artifacts strengthen promotion, trigger rollback review, or should only be observed.
prompts.user_prompt: Symbol=SRC_ROOT_CARRY_LONG_220646 artifact_summary=actionable_artifacts=0 latest_promotable=None rule_breaks=0 consumed_trend=no_consumed_validation consumed_targets=[] consumed_trend_status=no_consumed_validation consumed_trend_reason=no_consumed_artifacts highlighted_actions=["learning_semantics=class=positive_executed success_credit=1.000 observation_weight=1.000"] top_factor_trends=[] top_family_trends=[] top_rule_break_effects=[] top_consumed_trends=[]
success_criteria: Explicitly state whether artifact evidence strengthens promotion, rollback review, or observation only
Do not ignore rule-break effects when artifact review versions changed
Use consumed validation trends when realized artifact outcomes are available
Name the artifact-driven factor/family targets before recommending code edits

prompts.objective: Decide whether a factor iteration is strong enough to promote.
prompts.system_prompt: You are the promotion-gate agent. Only approve factor promotion when score deltas, grading, and supporting metrics clear the configured improvement thresholds. Reject cosmetic ranking changes.
prompts.user_prompt: Symbol=SRC_ROOT_CARRY_LONG_220646 thresholds={promotion_min_score_delta:0.100, promotion_min_score:0.700} top_rankings=[] score_deltas=[] learning_semantics=class=positive_executed success_credit=1.000 observation_weight=1.000
success_criteria: Only promote replace/tune outcomes when score delta is material and stability is not worse
If trade_count is low or dataset coverage changed, recommend holdout validation before promotion
Use learning_semantics to distinguish full-credit, fractional-credit, and no-credit feedback before approving promotion or rollback.

prompts.objective: Decide whether recent changes should be rolled back or isolated.
prompts.system_prompt: You are the rollback-review agent. Look for score degradation, action downgrades, and harmful probability shifts. Recommend rollback when the latest iteration weakened factor quality or destabilized outcome calibration.
prompts.user_prompt: Symbol=SRC_ROOT_CARRY_LONG_220646 thresholds={rollback_score_delta:-0.100, rollback_probability_delta:0.100} score_deltas=[] trade_outcome_deltas=[ProbabilityDiff { state: "breakeven", previous: Some(0.0008397155938703274), new: 0.0007557440344832944, delta: -8.397155938703296e-5 }, ProbabilityDiff { state: "loss", previous: Some(0.4141673565271506), new: 0.3727506208744355, delta: -0.041416735652715087 }, ProbabilityDiff { state: "win", previous: Some(0.5849929278789793), new: 0.6264936350910812, delta: 0.04150070721210197 }] learning_semantics=class=positive_executed success_credit=1.000 observation_weight=1.000
success_criteria: Recommend rollback when strong factors degrade materially or outcome calibration shifts against realized performance
If only one factor family regressed, prefer targeted rollback over full revert
Use learning_semantics to distinguish full-credit, fractional-credit, and no-credit feedback before approving promotion or rollback.

prompt_workflow: Use the realized update for SRC_ROOT_CARRY_LONG_220646 to review whether the latest result should change factor weights, factor evidence interpretation, or future trade acceptance thresholds.
